summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JioGen AI Avatar Platform with new Avatar V/IV engine support and ElevenLabs integration. Backend APIs mostly functional, frontend UI components working well with minor session management issues.

critical_bugs.issue: Missing voice_id parameter in HeyGen API call - returns 500 error
critical_bugs.impact: Breaks backward compatibility for original video generation

api_limit_issues.issue: OpenAI TTS budget exceeded - returns 500 error
api_limit_issues.workaround: Increase OpenAI API budget or use alternative TTS service

session_management.issue: Session timeout or authentication issues causing redirects to login page
session_management.impact: Users get logged out during navigation

loading_performance.issue: HeyGen avatars API takes 10-15 seconds to load, causing long loading spinner
loading_performance.impact: Poor user experience on avatar selection
loading_performance.workaround: Add loading progress indicator or skeleton UI

passed_tests: ElevenLabs Voices API (proper error handling for invalid keys)
Advanced Video Generation with Standard Engine
Advanced Video Generation with Avatar V Engine
Advanced Video Generation with Avatar IV Engine
CreatePage UI components (Script Creation Card, Video Configuration Card)
Voice Engine Card with HeyGen/ElevenLabs tabs
Avatar Engine Card with Standard/Avatar IV/Avatar V options
Script creation tabs (AI Generate, Paste, AI Rewrite)
Form inputs (prompt, script, title, duration, language)
Both original and advanced generate buttons present
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the original video generation route (/api/videos/generate) by adding default voice_id parameter when none is provided. This is breaking backward compatibility. Also consider implementing session management improvements to prevent authentication timeouts during navigation.
